required_inputs: request scope and intended ground handling action
dispatch, load-control, customs, security, maintenance, airport movement, dangerous goods, and safety authority context
refusal_triggers: request asks for dispatch release, final load-control acceptance, customs clearance, dangerous goods acceptance, security determination, maintenance return-to-service, airport movement approval, emergency command, or safety signoff
request attempts to close ground handling work without required service, custody, handoff, and blocker-resolution evidence

required_inputs: IATA, ICAO, FAA, eCFR, TSA, and CBP baseline sources
station SOP, SGHA, airline SLA, airport rules, customs procedure, security program, and tenant owner-map overlays
refusal_triggers: required public source context is missing or stale
public sources and tenant policies conflict materially on the operational outcome
tenant-specific SGHA, SOP, or SLA terms are required but unavailable

required_inputs: turn plan, station control record, and ramp log
load instruction, load sheet status, baggage scan, cargo manifest, ULD, and service-log records
GSE status, maintenance, customs, security, warehouse, and handoff records
refusal_triggers: critical movement, load, service, custody, handoff, approval, or completion evidence is absent or contradictory
record-of-truth systems materially disagree on current lifecycle, equipment, cargo, baggage, customs, or completion state

required_inputs: airport, airline, handler, dispatch, load-control, maintenance, security, customs, warehouse, and customer operations owner map
dependency status across station control, turn management, ramp logs, BRS, BHS, cargo, ULD, GSE, telematics, dispatch, maintenance, WMS, TMS, customs, and service systems
refusal_triggers: critical dependency owner is unresolved
systems of record materially disagree on movement, custody, equipment, load, cargo, service, customs, or completion state

required_inputs: tenant SOP, SGHA, SLA, airport-rule, and retrieval-hook completeness
refusal_triggers: missing tenant facts or authority maps would change the outcome
source or policy conflict prevents safe synthesis
safety, customs, security, dispatch, load-control, maintenance, or dangerous goods authority is unclear
request belongs to dispatch, load control, customs/compliance, maintenance, warehouse, security, airport operations, customer operations, emergency, or aviation compliance ownership
adjacent owner cannot be uniquely identified

required_inputs: record-of-truth state and required progression evidence
refusal_triggers: accepted state cannot be verified
required progression evidence is missing
state transition would bypass ramp safety, custody, load, customs, service, documentation, or handoff controls

required_inputs: affected movement, service, equipment, baggage, cargo, ULD, load-control, custody, service-level, and passenger-impact dependencies
refusal_triggers: exception depends on regulated, safety-critical, dispatch, load-control, customs, security, dangerous goods, airport movement, or maintenance approval
rework criteria or accountable owner is missing
completion criteria are not met
required source-system evidence is missing
destination-owner acknowledgement is absent
safety, load, custody, customs, security, service, equipment, or maintenance blockers remain unresolved

required_inputs: movement, route, stand, gate, belt, baggage, ULD, cargo, mail, load, and handoff records
route, stand, tow, or schedule disruption context
refusal_triggers: custody or handoff evidence is missing or contradictory
movement status depends on dispatch, load-control, customs, ATC, airport operations, security, maintenance, or safety approval
route or schedule disruption changes compliant movement posture

required_inputs: safety, condition, security, customs, dispatch, load-control, maintenance, dangerous goods, or movement-approval boundary facts
tenant station SOP, SGHA, SLA, airport ramp rules, security program, and local procedure context
refusal_triggers: movement depends on regulated or safety-critical approval
request asks the lane to imply dispatch, load-control, customs, security, maintenance, dangerous goods, airport movement, or safety authority
required safety, customs, condition, security, load-control, service, or movement approval evidence is missing
